scripts.build: npm run build -w @intelacraft/shared-protocol && npm run build -w @intelacraft/pi-extension && npm run build -w @intelacraft/mcp-connection && npm run build -w @intelacraft/controller && npm run build -w @intelacraft/bedrock-addon
scripts.test: npm run test -w @intelacraft/shared-protocol && npm run test -w @intelacraft/pi-extension && npm run test -w @intelacraft/controller
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w @intelacraft/shared-protocol && npm run typecheck -w @intelacraft/pi-extension && npm run typecheck -w @intelacraft/mcp-connection && npm run typecheck -w @intelacraft/controller && npm run typecheck -w @intelacraft/bedrock-addon
